## Risk review

- [ ] permissions and ownership
- [ ] business state transitions
- [ ] audit coverage
- [ ] migration/seed compatibility
- [ ] queue idempotency or side effects
- [ ] private data and file access
- [ ] ranking/matching/donation independence
- [ ] Turkish and English copy
- [ ] loading, empty, error, disabled and permission states

## Verification

```text
npm run verify
```

Additional tests and results:

## Deployment and rollback

Describe bindings, secrets, migration order, backfill, feature flag or rollback steps.

## Handoff

- [ ] `STATUS.md` updated when current phase/work changed
- [ ] `HANDOFF.md` updated when work continues across sessions
- [ ] `DECISIONS.md` updated for accepted or rejected alternatives
- [ ] migrations and seed changes documented
